faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in Jericho?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Jericho typically ranges from $350 to $2,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your home, and whether multiple colonies are present. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any treatment, ensuring transparent pricing for all Jericho homeowners.

faqs.question: How can I tell if I have carpenter ants in my Jericho home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include piles of wood shavings (frass) near baseboards or windowsills, rustling sounds inside walls, and seeing large black ants especially during spring evenings. Jericho homes with mature trees nearby or wood-to-soil contact points are particularly susceptible. If you notice winged ants indoors, you likely have an established colony requiring professional treatment.

faqs.question: Are carpenter ants common in Jericho, Long Island?
faqs.answer: Yes, carpenter ants are very common throughout Jericho due to the area's mature landscaping, wooded properties, and humidity from proximity to Long Island Sound. The combination of older homes with wood construction and abundant outdoor moisture sources makes Jericho neighborhoods particularly vulnerable to carpenter ant infestations, especially from April through September.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a carpenter ant problem in Jericho?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Jericho residents in most cases. Because carpenter ants cause progressive structural damage, we prioritize rapid response to protect your home. Our team serves all Jericho neighborhoods and can typically schedule your inspection and initial treatment within 24-48 hours of your call.
